title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE jumps 8.9%, leading index higher
summary: Solana (SOL) gained 4.5%, joining Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

title: Wall Street's IPO revival hasn't reached dot-com euphoria levels, Goldman Sachs says
summary: U.S. IPO issuance has rebounded sharply in 2026, but the bank said the current surge lacks the deal volume and speculative excess that defined the dot-com era.

title: With crypto ending the first half in the red, bitcoin's solace is it beat Strategy
Bitcoin bounces from $58,000 as derivatives signal more pain in the pipeline
summary: BTC touched its lowest level since September 2024 before rebounding to $59,770, while ETH slipped further and another $1 billion in futures positions were wiped out.

title: All eyes on Strategy's June 30 ex-dividend date and monthly STRC dividend rate reset
summary: Investors are watching the preferred stock's ex-dividend date and monthly dividend rate reset closely.
